name: Lead Gen Pipeline - Production Hardened - Gmail Verification Fixed

parameters.jsCode:
const warnings = [
  $json.email_warning,
  $json.attachment_warning,
  $json.gmail_verification_warning,
].filter(Boolean);

return [{ json: {
  ...$json,
  status: 'Draft_Created',
  failed_stage: '',
  error_code: '',
  error_message: '',
  retryable: false,
  draft_may_exist: true,
  gmail_verified: true,
  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  operator_action: warnings.length
    ? `Draft created and verified. Review in Gmail before sending. Warnings: ${warnings.join(' | ')}`
    : 'Draft created and verified. Review in Gmail before sending.',
} }];

const loop = $('Loop Over Items').item.json || $json || {};
const lead = loop.lead || {};
const now = new Date().toISOString();
return [{ json: {
  email: String(lead.email || '').trim().toLowerCase(),
  fullName: String(lead.fullName || lead.name || ''),
  companyName: String(lead.companyName || lead.organization_name || ''),
  companyLinkedinUrl: String(lead.companyLinkedinUrl || lead.organization_linkedin || ''),
  linkedinUrl: String(lead.linkedinUrl || lead.linkedin_url || ''),
  position: String(lead.position || lead.title || ''),
  emailStatus: String(lead.emailStatus || lead.email_status || ''),
  rowType: String(lead.rowType || 'tracker'),
  status: 'Processing',
  operator_action: 'Lead claimed by this execution and processing has started.',
  run_id: String(loop.run_id || ''),
  execution_id: String(loop.execution_id || ''),
  processing_started_at: now,
  updated_at: now,
  attempts: String(loop.attempts || 1),
  idempotency_key: String(loop.idempotency_key || lead.email || '').trim().toLowerCase(),
  failed_stage: '',
  error_code: '',
  error_message: '',
  retryable: 'true',
  draft_may_exist: 'false',
  gmail_verified: 'false',
} }];

meta.fixed_for: Production hardening: loop, claims, unified failures, Gmail verification, batch reconciliation
